data.title: Bitcoin Plunges Below $83K Amidst Market Downturn
data.description:
Bitcoin's price has dropped below $83,000, marking a significant decline in the cryptocurrency market. This development comes amidst a broader market downturn, with the U.S. stock market losing $1.5 trillion and the cryptocurrency market shedding $300 billion.

Analysts have been quick to weigh in on the situation. Arthur Hayes, the former CEO of BitMEX, has suggested that Bitcoin could potentially fall to $70,000, but he remains optimistic about the bull market cycle. Meanwhile, some investors are speculating about the impact of former U.S. President Donald Trump's recent press conference on cryptocurrency prices, wondering if it might present an opportunity to buy the dip.

Despite the recent volatility, some experts are looking beyond the short-term fluctuations. A recent analysis has explored the possibility of a cryptocurrency strategic reserve, suggesting that it could be a viable strategy for governments to manage their digital asset holdings. This long-term perspective highlights the potential for cryptocurrencies to play a significant role in global finance, even as their prices fluctuate in the near term.

data.title: Whales' Wild Ride: $TRUMP Token Swings $35M in Days
data.description:
In the volatile world of cryptocurrency, the $TRUMP token has been the subject of intense speculation and large-scale investments, with whales—big-money investors—playing a significant role in its price movements. Over the past several days, the $TRUMP market has witnessed substantial fluctuations, largely driven by the actions of a few notable whales.

The experience of one whale with $TRUMP has been a rollercoaster ride of gains and losses. Initially, the investor made an impressive $11.82 million on their first trade involving $TRUMP. However, their luck soon changed, as they faced a significant loss of $24.35 million on their second trade. Undeterred, the whale continued to pursue $TRUMP, only to suffer another loss of $201,000 on their third attempt. Despite these setbacks, the whale has not been discouraged and has recently re-entered the market, spending $11.28 million to buy 777,684 $TRUMP tokens at $14.50 each.

Another whale has also been active in the $TRUMP market. Four days ago, this whale opened a larger position, investing $5.23 million in the tokens at an average price of $13.07 each. Since then, the price of $TRUMP has increased, and the whale now holds 400,000 tokens that would net them $5.57 million if sold on Binance, indicating a potential profit of $34.4 million.

These trades highlight the influence of whales on the cryptocurrency market, particularly for less-liquid tokens like $TRUMP. Whales can significantly impact the price of such tokens, attracting attention and capital from other investors. The $TRUMP token's volatile nature has drawn serious money from traders and investors looking to profit from its price swings, despite the risks involved.

The future of $TRUMP remains uncertain, with its value likely to swing dramatically in either direction. News events related to $TRUMP or broader market trends could play a crucial role in determining its immediate and longer-term future. As whales continue to make big moves, the high-stakes nature of today's cryptocurrency markets is evident, with fortunes made and lost in the blink of an eye.

data.title: MARA's Bitcoin Production Slips 6% Amidst Hash Rate Boost
data.description:
MARA Holdings, a leading cryptocurrency mining company, saw its shares trading lower on Tuesday following the release of its February bitcoin production update. The company announced that it had produced 706 bitcoins during the month, a 6% decrease from the previous month.

The decline in bitcoin production was primarily attributed to a decrease in the number of blocks won by MARA's mining operations. Despite the drop, the company's total hash rate increased by 10% month-over-month, reaching 3.65 EH/s. This increase was driven by the deployment of new mining machines and the expansion of its mining operations.

MARA's shares were trading 3.99% down in the pre-market session at $13.24. The decline in share price can be attributed to the decrease in bitcoin production, which may have raised concerns about the company's profitability. However, it is important to note that the company's total hash rate increase may offset the impact of the lower bitcoin production on its earnings.

MARA's February production update comes amidst a volatile cryptocurrency market, with bitcoin prices fluctuating significantly in recent weeks. The company's mining operations have been expanding rapidly, with a focus on increasing its hash rate and improving its mining efficiency. As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, MARA's ability to adapt and innovate will be crucial to its long-term success.

data.title: Grass Team's $13M Deposit Sparks Sell-Off Fears
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market has been abuzz with concerns surrounding the Grass team's recent deposit of 4.75 million $GRASS tokens to the Bybit exchange, worth approximately $13.01 million. This significant transaction has sparked fears of a potential sell-off, which could catalyze a price dip for the $GRASS token.

Over the past week, the $GRASS token has been one of the top gainers in the market, with a nearly 36% increase in price. This impressive growth has been driven by a combination of factors, including rising decentralized platform enthusiasm, possible developments with the Grass ecosystem, and a generally bullish cryptocurrency market. Many investors seem to be backing the token as a good long-term bet.

The deposit comes on the heels of a period of impressive growth for the $GRASS token, raising concerns among investors that the team may be preparing to sell a significant chunk of its holdings. While the Grass team has not officially commented on their intentions, such large deposits often precede major price movements. Investors are now watching closely for any signs of a sell-off.

It is worth noting that this is not the first large deposit of $GRASS tokens by the team to an exchange. Two months ago, a similarly large amount of tokens was transferred, leading to similar speculation regarding the intentions behind the move. While the Grass team has not confirmed whether they plan to sell or simply move tokens for liquidity purposes, investors are keeping a close eye on the situation.

As the situation unfolds, investors should pay attention to a few key factors. Most crucial is to keep an eye out for any announcements or actions from the Grass team. If they confirm that they’re selling some of their holdings, there will likely be significant market volatility. If they’re moving tokens for operational or liquidity reasons, though, the market may hardly react.

Market sentiment around $GRASS is still largely positive, with its strong performance over the past week indicating that investors are still very much on board with its potential. However, the recent deposit has brought an aura of uncertainty to the token. Investors should keep a close eye on market sentiment and any updates from the Grass team to gauge the potential impact on the token's price.

In conclusion, it is crucial to monitor the activity on Bybit. A large-scale sell-off of $GRASS tokens

data.title: XRP Price Drop 12% Despite Trump's Crypto Reserve Announcement
data.description:
XRP, the native cryptocurrency of the Ripple network, has experienced a recent downturn, with its price dropping by approximately 12% today. This decline comes after a brief period of optimism following Donald Trump's announcement of a US Crypto Reserve, which included plans to incorporate US-issued assets like XRP, SOL, and ADA into the Strategic Reserve. However, the crypto market's recent crash has dampened this enthusiasm.

Despite the recent price fluctuations, market analysts remain optimistic about XRP's long-term prospects. A recent analysis by an unnamed analyst predicts a significant rally in XRP's price, with the coin potentially reaching $30 by May 2025. This prediction is based on technical indicators and a potential weekly channel formation similar to the one observed in 2017. During that cycle, XRP's price surged by 2,500% from the low end of the channel to the blow-off top. The analyst believes that history may repeat itself, with XRP's price targeting the Fib 1.618 level, between $27-$33.

Adding to this optimism is Donald Trump's recent announcement, which has fueled investor confidence in XRP. Trump's close ties with Ripple officials and the potential inclusion of XRP in the Strategic Reserve assets have further bolstered the coin's prospects. However, it is essential to consider the potential risks and exercise due diligence when investing in XRP.

While the recent crypto market crash may have dampened short-term sentiment, the analyst's prediction suggests that XRP price could surge within the next 28 days, potentially reaching $30 by May 12, 2025. However, another renowned market analyst, Ali Martinez, has warned of a potential correction to $1 for the crypto if it falls below the crucial support of $2. This highlights the importance of careful consideration and risk management when investing in volatile markets like cryptocurrency.

data.title: Ethereum RWA Collateral Network's OpenZK Airdrop Event Garners 10,000 Participants
data.description:
The Ethereum Real-World Asset (RWA) Collateral Network's OpenZK Airdrop Event has garnered significant attention, attracting over 10,000 participants within its first week. This initiative, aimed at fostering decentralized finance (DeFi) adoption and innovation, has sparked considerable interest among the crypto community.

The event, which involves the distribution of OpenZK tokens to eligible participants, has been designed to incentivize engagement with the Ethereum RWA Collateral Network. The network, which facilitates the tokenization of real-world assets, is a key component of the broader DeFi ecosystem. By encouraging participation in the airdrop event, the network seeks to expand its user base and foster greater liquidity within the platform.

In parallel with the OpenZK Airdrop Event, the broader crypto market has witnessed several notable developments. Notably, Solana (SOL) whales have recently unstaked approximately 79,530 SOL tokens, valued at around $43 each, totaling approximately $10.86 million. This move suggests a shift in investment strategy among large SOL holders, potentially indicating a change in market sentiment.

Meanwhile, a high-leverage trader, either a whale or a non-insider using phishing funds, has reportedly generated a significant profit of $7.13 million using 50x leverage. This transaction highlights the potential risks and rewards associated with high-leverage trading in the crypto market.

In other news, the USDC Treasury has burned 50 million USDC tokens on the Solana blockchain. This action, which involves the permanent removal of tokens from circulation, is a common practice used to manage the supply of stablecoins and maintain their peg to the underlying asset.

Lastly, a notable crypto investor, Ansem, has sold his holdings of WIF and FARTCOIN, incurring a loss of approximately $320,000. This transaction underscores the volatility and risk inherent in the crypto market, as investors navigate the challenges and opportunities presented by the rapidly evolving landscape.

data.title: Infrared Raises $16.25M for Pioneering DeFi Liquidity Staking
data.description:
Infrared, a pioneering project in the Berachain ecosystem, has successfully raised a total of $16.25 million in funding, marking a significant milestone in the development of decentralized finance (DeFi) and liquidity staking protocols. The project, which is the first incubated project of the Berachain Foundation's Build-a-Bera incubator, has attracted investments from prominent venture capital firms and institutions.

The funding round was led by Framework Ventures, with a $14 million Series A investment. Previously, Infrared Finance completed a $2.5 million seed round, with Synergis as the lead investor and participation from NGC Ventures and Shima Capital. Notably, Binance Labs, now renamed YZi Labs, also participated in Infrared's strategic funding round, although the specific amount was not disclosed.

Infrared's innovative liquidity staking protocol enables users to stake native Berachain tokens, BGT and BERA, while maintaining liquidity and earning rewards. The project's core team comprises experienced professionals from Berachain, apple, NASA, Kraken, and Optimism, bringing a wealth of expertise to the table.

The successful funding round and launch of the first liquidity staking protocol on Berachain underscore the growing interest and potential of DeFi and liquidity staking in the blockchain ecosystem. As the project continues to develop, it is poised to play a significant role in shaping the future of decentralized finance and liquidity provision.

data.title: Uber and Waymo Team Up for Driverless Rides in Austin
data.description:
Uber and Waymo, two of the world's leading technology companies, have joined forces to launch a driverless ride service in Austin, Texas. This significant development in the autonomous vehicle industry marks a major milestone in the quest for safer, more efficient transportation.

The collaboration between uber and Waymo, a subsidiary of alphabet inc., brings together Uber's extensive ride-hailing experience and Waymo's cutting-edge self-driving technology. The new service, which began operating in Austin earlier this month, offers customers the opportunity to hail a self-driving vehicle through the Uber app, with a Waymo-trained driver behind the wheel for safety and support.

The launch of this service in Austin is a testament to the city's commitment to innovation and its role as a testing ground for emerging technologies. The Texas capital has long been a hub for tech startups and is now poised to become a leader in the autonomous vehicle revolution.

The driverless ride service in Austin is part of a broader trend towards the adoption of autonomous vehicles in various industries. Companies like Tesla, General Motors, and Ford are also investing heavily in the development of self-driving technology, with the aim of reducing accidents, improving fuel efficiency, and enhancing overall mobility.

However, the path to widespread adoption of autonomous vehicles is not without challenges. Regulatory hurdles, public acceptance, and technical limitations must be overcome before self-driving cars can become a common sight on roads worldwide. The collaboration between Uber and Waymo is a significant step in addressing these challenges and paving the way for a future where autonomous vehicles are an integral part of our daily lives.

data.title: Yellen Vows Lower Rates, Infrastructure Boost
data.description:
U.S. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen has expressed the administration's determination to lower interest rates, as indicated in a recent interview with Fox. Yellen's comments come amidst ongoing discussions about tariffs and the performance of the stock market. She emphasized that the U.S. government is focusing on the medium-term perspective, stating that "Wall Street is doing well, and Wall Street can continue to perform well... we will rebalance the economy." Additionally, Yellen mentioned that the U.S. is currently in a "transition" regarding tariffs on Canada and Mexico.

In a separate development, Yellen has been vocal about the need for infrastructure investment to boost economic growth. She has called for a significant increase in infrastructure spending, stating that it would create jobs and stimulate the economy. Yellen has also emphasized the importance of addressing income inequality and promoting inclusive growth.

Yellen's comments on interest rates and infrastructure investment reflect the administration's broader economic agenda. The Treasury Secretary has been a strong advocate for policies that support economic growth and job creation, while also addressing longstanding economic challenges. Her remarks underscore the administration's commitment to a balanced approach to economic policy, focusing on both short-term and long-term priorities.

In the global context, Yellen's comments on interest rates and infrastructure investment have been met with interest from international partners. Other countries have been watching the U.S. economic policy closely, as it has significant implications for the global economy. Yellen's remarks have been seen as a sign of the U.S. government's commitment to working with international partners to promote economic growth and stability.

As the U.S. economy continues to evolve, Yellen's comments on interest rates and infrastructure investment highlight the administration's focus on fostering a strong and resilient economy. Her remarks underscore the importance of a balanced approach to economic policy, one that addresses both short-term and long-term priorities. As the U.S. government works to navigate the complexities of the global economy, Yellen's comments offer a glimpse into the administration's economic priorities and its commitment to promoting economic growth and stability.

data.title: Herzfeld Caribbean Basin Fund: A New Chapter in CLO Equity
data.description:
The herzfeld caribbean basin fund, Inc. (CUBA) has announced a significant shift in its investment strategy, marking a new chapter for the fund and its shareholders. The Board of Directors has approved a change in the fund's primary objective, moving away from Caribbean Basin investments to focus on a CLO Equity Strategy. This strategic pivot aims to enhance value for shareholders by leveraging market dynamics and the fund's closed-end fund structure.



The Fund's new investment objective is to generate total returns and high current income for shareholders by investing in equity and junior debt tranches of collateralized loan obligations (CLOs). CLOs are portfolios of collateralized loans consisting primarily of below investment grade U.S. senior secured loans with a large number of distinct underlying borrowers across various industry sectors. This change in strategy comes after 30 years of Caribbean-focused investment, with management acknowledging the long-anticipated Cuban market liberalization thesis has not materialized.



The new fee structure, approved by the Board, consists of a 1.25% management fee and a 10% incentive fee, subject to a 9% hurdle rate. This structure aligns with industry norms for CLO-focused funds and signals management's confidence in the new strategy. However, it introduces performance-based compensation that could potentially increase overall expenses depending on returns. The 9% hurdle rate suggests management's expectations for returns, providing a useful benchmark for shareholders.

The Fund's scale efficiency challenge remains a significant factor in its ability to execute the new CLO-focused strategy effectively. With a market capitalization of only $36.6 million, the Fund may face difficulties in managing a portfolio of CLO equity tranches, which typically require a larger asset base to achieve economies of scale and diversify risk. To mitigate this challenge, the Fund can consider increasing assets under management, partnering with other funds or institutions, optimizing portfolio composition, maintaining a competitive fee structure, and demonstrating expertise in CLO selection and management.

In conclusion, the Herzfeld Caribbean Basin Fund's strategic pivot to a CLO Equity Strategy represents a fundamental transformation that warrants serious investor attention. While the new strategy introduces different risks and potential returns, it also offers the opportunity for shareholders to benefit from the fund's expertise and track record in the credit market. Shareholders should carefully consider the potential implications of this dramatic change and evaluate whether the new strategy aligns with their investment goals.

data.description:
The U.S. stocks have taken several hits lately, however, this could also make now the greatest time to invest in some "fallen" companies. If you have the same thoughts as us, then we have some recommendations for you, because no matter what others think, we believe they will rise to meet the challenges of this rapidly evolving capital environment and will not be swept aside by the tides of change.

HERE ARE OUR PICKS FOR THIS WEEK!

----------------------------------------------------------

Tesla, Inc. (TSLA): Driving Toward the Future

Current Share Price: $284.65 

Market Capitalization: $891.94B

Target Price: $384.83

Recommendation: Hold

Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) is an avant-garde leader in electric vehicles (EVs), solar energy, and sustainable energy solutions, making significant strides in transforming the automotive and energy sectors globally.

Financially, tesla presents a robust picture with total revenue reaching $97.69 billion, showcasing a modest revenue growth of 2.1%. The company enjoys substantial gross profits of $17.45 billion, translating to a gross margin of 17.86%. Its EBITDA margins are solid at 13.33%, amounting to $13.03 billion, reflecting efficient operational management despite intense competition and market dynamics. However, Tesla's operating margins stand at 6.16%, indicating room for enhancement in operational efficiency.

Tesla's liquidity position is impressive, with total cash reserves of $36.56 billion ($11.37 per share) and an operating cash flow of $14.92 billion. The company's debt levels are manageable, with total debt amounting to $13.62 billion, resulting in a low debt-to-equity ratio of 18.49%. Despite a negative free cash flow of -$826.88 million, Tesla maintains a solid current ratio of 2.03, ensuring sufficient short-term liquidity.

Profitability metrics reflect positively on Tesla, with a return on assets (ROA) of 4.19% and a return on equity (ROE) of 10.42%, underscoring effective asset and equity utilization. However, Tesla's earnings growth has seen a decline of 70.9%, necessitating strategic initiatives to sustain profitability.

Analysts recommend a Hold rating with a mean score of 2.74. Price targets range from $135.00 to $550.00, with the median target set at $384.83. Market sentiment remains cautiously optimistic about Tesla's innovative edge in the EV and energy markets.

Tesla, Inc. represents a compelling investment opportunity for those seeking exposure to the innovative EV and sustainable energy sectors. With its strong financial position and commitment to innovation, Tesla remains a key player to watch.

Intel Corporation (INTC): Innovating Despite Challenges

Current Share Price: $22.74

Market Capitalization: $98.08B

Target Price: $31.00

Recommendation: Hold

Intel Corporation (INTC) is a global leader in semiconductor manufacturing, renowned for its processors, chipsets, and data center solutions, serving diverse markets from personal computing to AI.

Financially, Intel faces recent challenges with total revenue reaching $53.1 billion, representing a revenue contraction of 7.4%. Gross profits are substantial at $18.22 billion, translating to a gross margin of 34.32%. However, the operating margins are negative at -18.55%, resulting in an EBITDA margin of 14.17%, or $7.53 billion, reflecting recent operational difficulties.

Intel boasts significant liquidity with total cash reserves of $22.06 billion ($5.09 per share), and a substantial operating cash flow of $8.29 billion. Nonetheless, the company carries considerable debt, with total debt at $50.71 billion, resulting in a moderate debt-to-equity ratio of 48.28%.

The company's return on assets (ROA) stands at -1.23%, while the return on equity (ROE) is -17.89%, signifying areas requiring strategic adjustments to regain profitability.

Analysts have issued a Hold recommendation with a mean rating of 3.02. Price targets span from $17.70 to $31.00, with the median target set at $21.10. The market perception of Intel reflects cautious optimism tempered by recent financial hurdles.

Intel Corporation continues to be a vital player in the semiconductor industry despite recent setbacks. Its substantial cash reserves and ongoing innovations hold promise, making it a worthwhile consideration for long-term investors prepared to navigate short-term challenges.

Newmont Corporation (NEM): A Golden Opportunity

Current Share Price: $42.36

Market Capitalization: $48.22B

Median Target Price: $52.50

Recommendation: Buy

Newmont Corporation (NEM) stands as a powerful entity in the gold mining sector, boasting a significant global footprint that ensures it remains a key player in the supply of this precious metal.

Key financial metrics highlight Newmont's robust fiscal health. The company's revenue has surged to an impressive $18.68 billion, showcasing a robust year-on-year growth of 42.8%. This revenue growth is complemented by substantial gross profits amounting to $9.39 billion, yielding a gross margin of 50.27%. These figures are a testament to Newmont's operational efficiency and its ability to effectively manage its cost structure.

From a profitability standpoint, Newmont exhibits strong metrics, including an operating margin of 40.85% and an EBITDA margin of 46.71%. This high level of profitability underscores Newmont's operational proficiency and its ability to generate significant earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization.

The company also demonstrates commendable liquidity, with total cash reserves of $3.64 billion ($3.21 per share) and a solid operating cash flow of $6.36 billion. However, it is noteworthy that Newmont maintains a significant debt load, with total debt standing at $8.97 billion, resulting in a debt-to-equity ratio of 29.80%. Despite this, the company's strong cash flow positions it well to manage its debt obligations effectively.

Profitability indicators are also positive, with a return on assets (ROA) of 6.61% and a return on equity (ROE) of 11.17%. These figures highlight Newmont's efficiency in utilizing its assets and equity to generate profits. Further, the profit margin of 17.92% reinforces the company's strong profitability outlook.

Analysts are optimistic about Newmont's future, assigning a Buy rating with a mean recommendation score of 1.95. Price targets for the stock range from $45.00 to $65.43, with the median target standing at $52.50. This optimistic outlook suggests that Newmont is well-positioned to continue its upward trajectory amidst market volatility.

In conclusion, Newmont Corporation presents a compelling investment opportunity in the gold mining sector, supported by its robust financial performance, efficient operations, and significant market position. For investors looking to gain exposure to precious metals, Newmont offers stability and potential for substantial returns.

data.title: Tesla's China-made EV Sales Tumbled 49% in February, With Slump Demand and Musk Concerns
data.description:
Tesla is facing backlash due to intense competition in China, while European consumers have lost faith in Elon Musk.

The U.S. EV maker sold 93,926 China-made vehicles globally in January and February, according to the China Passenger Car Association (CPCA).

Deliveries of the China-made Model 3 and Model Y vehicles dropped 49.2% in February compared to the same period last year, reaching 30,688 units—the lowest since August 2022—following an 11.5% decline in January.

The January-February sales were affected by the Chinese New Year holiday shifting from February last year to late January this year and a partial suspension of Model Y production for upgrade work. The automaker also exports these vehicles to markets including Europe, where sales plunged 45% in January.

Tesla recently updated its FSD software in China to enable city navigation in late February. The company also began deliveries of the revamped Model Y in its second-largest market. However, with intense competition and youth more favorable to Xiaomi and other domestic automakers, the outdated model is no longer attractive anymore.

In Europe, Tesla's sales continued to decline in February. The company sold 2,395 vehicles in France, marking another 26% year-over-year decline. Sales in Norway, Sweden, and Denmark fell by over 40% in February alone.

The decline in European sales is partly attributed to the negative perception of tesla due to Elon Musk's involvement in global politics. The U.S. government, led by Trump and Musk, has faced backlash, with Musk's public comments on global affairs, such as the recent German election, generating widespread dislike. Additionally, Trump's tariff threats have fueled anti-Tesla sentiment in China, with Trump planning to impose a further 10% tariff starting Tuesday.

data.title: ELF Beauty's $500M Lifeline: Shares Dip 1.07% in Premarket
Prada Profit Surges 21% Amidst Versace Bid Speculation
data.description:
Prada SpA, the Italian luxury goods conglomerate, has reported a 21% surge in profits for the fiscal year 2024, driven by strong sales and efficient cost management. The company's net revenues reached €5.4 billion, with retail sales accounting for €4.8 billion. The Prada brand recorded a 4% increase in sales, while Miu Miu, the company's subsidiary, saw a remarkable 93% increase in sales, marking a record year for the brand. Prada's net financial position improved to a positive €600 million, reflecting the company's effective cost control and operational efficiency.

Prada's impressive financial performance comes amidst speculation that the company is considering a bid for Italian luxury fashion house Versace. According to Bloomberg News, prada and capri holdings Ltd., the owner of Versace, have agreed on a price of nearly €1.5 billion for the acquisition. The two companies are reportedly close to finalizing a deal, which could be announced as early as March 2025. If successful, the acquisition would enable Prada to create a larger Italian player, better positioned to compete with global luxury groups such as LVMH and Kering.

The potential acquisition of Versace aligns with Prada's long-term investment strategy, as it would expand the company's market reach, increase its scale and market share, and provide access to new talent and expertise. However, integrating Versace into Prada's existing operations presents several challenges and risks, including cultural differences, financial challenges, supply chain and manufacturing issues, retail and distribution challenges, and leadership and management integration. To mitigate these challenges, Prada should foster a culture of collaboration and mutual respect between the two brands, encourage creative exchange and learning between the design teams, and ensure that both brands maintain their unique identities while leveraging synergies in areas like marketing and distribution.

In conclusion, Prada's 21% profit surge in 2024 is a testament to the company's strong brand performance, geographical expansion, and efficient cost management. The potential acquisition of Versace, if successful, would further enhance Prada's market position and growth prospects. However, the company must address the challenges and risks associated with integrating Versace into its existing operations to ensure a successful and sustainable long-term partnership.

Treasury Secretary Bessent: We're Set on Bringing Interest Rates Down - Fox News Interview
data.description:
In a recent interview with Fox News, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent discussed the Trump administration's plans to lower long-term interest rates, focusing on the 10-year Treasury yield. Bessent's approach differs from the Federal Reserve's, with potential implications for the U.S. economy and working-class Americans' concerns about affordability and inflation.

Bessent's plan to lower long-term interest rates differs from the Federal Reserve's approach in several ways. While the Fed primarily focuses on managing short-term interest rates, Bessent aims to influence the 10-year Treasury yield through fiscal policy and deregulation. This strategy has potential implications for the U.S. economy, including lower borrowing costs for businesses and consumers, potential impacts on inflation, and the preservation of monetary policy independence.

The Trump administration plans to implement specific fiscal policies and deregulation measures to achieve its goal of lowering the 10-year Treasury yield. These policies include making the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act permanent, reducing federal spending and waste, lowering energy costs, and implementing tariff policies. These measures aim to stimulate economic growth, reduce inflation, and decrease the demand for government debt, ultimately lowering the 10-year Treasury yield.

Bessent's focus on lowering long-term interest rates directly addresses the concerns of working-class Americans regarding affordability and inflation. By lowering the 10-year Treasury yield, the administration aims to make housing and other goods more affordable for working-class Americans. Additionally, the administration's plan to deregulate the economy and make the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act permanent will help lower long-term interest rates, further addressing affordability concerns. The administration's focus on limiting inflation expectations by showing discipline on spending is also crucial for working-class Americans, as it helps prevent inflation from rising and increasing the cost of living.

In conclusion, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent's plan to lower long-term interest rates, as discussed in the Fox News interview, has the potential to address the concerns of working-class Americans regarding affordability and inflation. By focusing on the 10-year Treasury yield through fiscal policy and deregulation, the Trump administration aims to lower borrowing costs for businesses and consumers, reduce inflation, and decrease the demand for government debt. These policies, if implemented effectively, could potentially lower the 10-year Treasury yield and improve the overall economic outlook for working-class Americans.

data.title: Merck & Co.'s (MRK.US) Letermovir Microcrystal Nominated for CDE Priority Review, a New Drug for Children
data.description:
Today, the National Medical Products Administration's (NMPA) Center for Drug Evaluation (CDE) officially announced that merck & Co., Inc. (MRK.US) had applied for priority review for its Letermovir Microcrystal, which is intended for the prevention of cytomegalovirus (CMV) infection and disease in adult and pediatric recipients aged 6 months and older with a body weight of ≥6kg who are seropositive for CMV and have received allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation (HSCT) [R+]. Letermovir is a new non-nucleoside CMV inhibitor. The tablet and injection formulations of the product have been approved for marketing in China. According to the CDE's announcement, Letermovir Microcrystal is a new pediatric drug.

Cytomegalovirus, a widely prevalent herpes virus, poses a serious threat to the life and health of hematopoietic stem cell transplantation patients. Studies have shown that the seropositive rate of cytomegalovirus in these patients can be as high as 90% or more. Although preemptive therapy is an effective method to control CMV, many allogeneic HSCT recipients still face the problem of difficult-to-treat cytomegalovirus infection, and the preemptive therapy drugs have problems such as bone marrow suppression and renal toxicity, increasing the risk of death and medical burden for patients.
